name: Lompoc Tri-Tip Barbecue
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olive oil, Worcestershire sauce, soy sauce, lemon juice, chopped garlic, and dry mustard in a bowl.
2. Place the beef tri-tip roast in a large resealable plastic bag or a shallow dish.
3. Pour the marinade over the meat, ensuring it is well coated.
4. Seal the bag or cover the dish and refrigerate for 24 hours, turning several times to ensure even coating.
5. About 2 hours before grilling, remove the meat from the refrigerator to allow it to come to room temperature.
6. Preheat your grill to medium heat.
7. Grill the marinated tri-tip roast over medium heat for about 15 to 20 minutes on each side, brushing frequently with the remaining marinade.
8. Cook until the internal temperature reaches 130-135°F (54-57°C) for desired doneness.
